reasoning: Gold frame uses 4+ graduated tones instead of 2-3 hard tones — classic AI pixel-art gradient smear. At 8x zoom right panel, the gold arch wall shows continuous brightness ramp rather than deliberate dithering steps. Arch left/right arms differ by 1-2px in width at keystone, indicating asymmetry. Background fringe on right edge of 8x sprite shows 3-4 stray off-color pixels (gray-brown) not belonging to any outline layer — noise tell. Teal/cyan accent gems at arch apex have irregular blob shapes with misaligned pixel clusters rather than clean 1px or 2px gem forms. Orange-gold bleeds ~1px into the dark-green portal fill on the right wall interior. No melting of details, no pattern tiling artifacts, no semantic failure (correctly depicts an open arch gate). Sub-pixel rendering absent — pixels are hard squares. Outline width is mostly consistent at 1px. Overall the asset is usable but carries multiple mid-severity AI generation fingerprints concentrated in the shading and accent work.
